suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the dxf-bridge-worker skill to prefer the working bridge test command cargo test --bin H7CAD native_bridge -- --test-threads=16 and to verify manifest commands when a package lacks the referenced target.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Bridge-entities scrutiny round 1 and the follow-up fixes both relied on a stale cargo test --lib native_bridge command; the repository manifest now exposes the correct 	est_bridge command in .factory/services.yaml.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify dxf-bridge-worker guidance for attribution-repair follow-ups when assigned files are already clean at HEAD, so workers know whether to return without a commit, create an empty attribution artifact elsewhere, or escalate immediately.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The bridge-annotations-images-payload-attribution-repair follow-up could not create a feature commit because the assigned bridge file already matched HEAD, but the current skill text still says workers should still create a feature commit when assigned files were already dirty.

rejectedObservations.observation: The dxf-bridge-worker skill still tells workers to trust the manifest command from services.yaml after verifying workspace layout, but bridge features in this mission repeatedly had to use `cargo test --bin H7CAD native_bridge -- --test-threads=16` because the contract text and older command forms referring to `--lib native_bridge` are stale for this workspace layout.
Update .factory/services.yaml with the working bridge test command.
